chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.S-292 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) For orders as to non-prosecution 03.12.2025 None present. --------- This matter was placed before the Court on 21.04.2025 when learned counsel for the petitioner sought time to make compliance of the office objection. Then, again, it was fixed on 03.09.2025, further 07 days’ time was granted. Today, none is in attendance which reflects that the petitioner has lost interest in pursuing this petition, therefore, this Court is left with no option but to dismiss it for non-prosecution. JUDGE Nadir*
